found_stable.quote: Vendor may process Customer Data to provide and improve the services, develop analytics, and perform other business purposes reasonably related to the service relationship.
Vendor may modify service terms, acceptable use limits, and other online policies by posting an updated version to its website, effective upon posting.
Vendor may assign this Agreement or delegate performance to any successor, affiliate, subcontractor, or financing source without Customer's consent.
Vendor will maintain insurance it determines is commercially reasonable, including general liability coverage of at least $500,000 per occurrence if available on commercially reasonable terms.
